**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## pinctrl-names

Property name: `pinctrl-names`

Value type: `<stringlist>`

The list of names to assign states. List entry 0 defines the name for integer state ID 0, list entry 1 for state ID 1, and so on.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel bindings (`qcom,geni-i2c`)

The unwedge pinctrl entry shall drive the DDC SDA line low. This is
intended to work around a hardware errata that can cause the DDC I2C
bus to be wedged.

---

**Source:** Linux kernel Documentation

```
  - pinctrl-names: names of the pin control states to use
```
